title: ETT First Bounded Knowledge Import Plan
objective: Define the first bounded active import tranche from the NETA ETT Study Material source domain into the unified platform root using the approved knowledge classification and retention rules.
required_inputs: Monorepo target topology and knowledge lane structure
constrained_outputs: A first-tranche import manifest and target mapping under Platform-Authority and ops/agents/handoffs
Explicit exclusions for source-library binaries, archive-heavy material, and wholesale Development/ import
No physical import execution in this packet
validation_steps: Confirm the first-tranche import is limited to bounded active knowledge assets and low-weight operationally justified surfaces
Confirm heavy source-library and archive holdings are excluded or treated as storage-governed inputs rather than default repo imports
Confirm Development/ is decomposed by sub-slice rather than imported wholesale
Confirm the packet produces a concrete next execution packet recommendation for physical knowledge import
sql_permission_note: This packet is knowledge import planning only. It does not authorize physical migration, database work, or heavyweight binary movement.
